In-depth Reports

Draw decisive conclusions from actionable insights

Identify the best performing fields, areas that need attention, and find productive insights to grow your business from your past order data.

Start for Free See a Demo

Reports that actually help you grow

Every report in Foaps is built around the questions restaurant owners actually ask.

  • 📊

    Sales Reports

    Track daily, weekly, and monthly revenue across all delivery platforms. Understand your growth trajectory.

  • 🏆

    Top Performers

    See which menu items, times, and platforms bring in the most revenue — and double down on what works.

  • ⏰

    Peak Hour Analysis

    Identify your busiest hours to staff up, prep ahead, and ensure you never miss an order.

  • 📉

    Loss Analysis

    Find out what's dragging your numbers down — cancellations, refusals, or slow-moving items.

  • 🌐

    Platform Comparison

    Compare performance across Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and others side-by-side.

  • 📆

    Custom Date Ranges

    Filter any report by your own date range to analyze specific campaigns or time periods.

Why it matters

Turn your order data into growth decisions

Most restaurant owners look at sales at the end of the month and wonder where the money went. Foaps gives you a clear picture, in real time, of what's working and what isn't.

From identifying your top revenue-generating platform to understanding which items consistently get cancelled — Foaps turns raw data into actionable intelligence.

Get Started Free

Stop guessing. Start growing.

Use Foaps in-depth reports to make smarter decisions for your restaurant.

Start for Free
